sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36795" key="e)canqrako/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξανθρᾰκόω</orth>, <sense id="n36795.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burn to ashes,</tr_> Ion Trag.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
